conclusion: IMPORTANT FINDING: None of the 15 confirmed data fabrication cases in genomics have deposited raw data in GEO. Fabricators avoid sharing raw data. This means: (1) our tool cannot be validated on confirmed fabrication because fabricated raw data is not publicly available, and (2) mandatory raw data deposition would itself be a deterrent against fabrication. This finding strengthens the paper: we document WHY real-world validation of fabrication detection tools is fundamentally limited.
